view.title: Validate persona scenario #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of group size changes after booking.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of group size changes after booking.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of group size changes after booking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but the evidence provided does not include specific details or mechanisms that demonstrate how such changes are handled within the system. While the linked use case describes a booking scenario, it lacks concrete evidence of how the system manages changes to group size or the implications of such changes on the booking status. Therefore, the requirement cannot be conclusively validated based on the current evidence.
